reasoning: Classic risk-off rotation: XLK -0.33% + XLF -0.44% (financials leading weakness) while XLE +0.14%. Both tech and financials selling simultaneously; energy flat-to-slightly-up defensive signal. SPY -0.47% confirms internals weakness. This is a clear bearish sector alignment with medium-high confidence—two of three major sectors down >0.3%, financials showing greater weakness than tech, signaling institutional exit. Ribbon is BULL-stacked and SPY gapped up +0.73% overnight, but sector composition is deteriorating into premarket.
key_observations: XLK: -0.33% (tech selling into premarket, but lighter than financials)
XLF: -0.44% (financials leading the selloff, deeper weakness signals institutional caution)
XLE: +0.14% (defensive tilt—energy stabilizing while growth/rates-sensitive sectors fall)
Rotation assessment: Classic risk-off. Both growth (XLK) and rate-sensitive (XLF) sectors down; energy neutral. Contradicts overnight +0.73% SPY gap.
Breadth: Narrow. Not a broad-based selloff, but tech+finance combo is the SPY composition core.
